The effects of the door being in the 8 places beginning with
Roga and ending with Dili on the north are (1) death or imprison-
ment, (2) increase of enemies, (3) influx of wealth and birth of
sons, (4) possession of all virtues, (6) getting children and wealth,
(6) enmity with one's own son, ^7) faults of wife, and (8) poverty.
would have been a better expression.
On the eastern side the auspicious squares for the doors are
Parjanya, Jayama and Indra; on the southern side, Bfhatksataonly;

478 Brhat Samhita
on the western side, Kusumadanta and Varuna; and on the north-
ern side, Mukhya, Bhallaja and Soma.
